product_overview: GameFinal (Paisa War) is a turn-based multiplayer strategy card game where players join rooms, take turns, and use cards to compete toward a wealth goal. The app supports authentication, lobby matchmaking, and a real-time game board on both mobile and desktop.
core_goals: Create an account or log in to access the game
Find or create a multiplayer room from the dashboard
Play turn-based matches by selecting and confirming cards
Target opponents and make card-driven decisions during gameplay
Track real-time game progress through the game log and wealth updates

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Users can sign up or log in to access their game account and profile.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See authenticated access
Navigate to /auth -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit sign-up form -> See authenticated access

features.name: Dashboard and Matchmaking
features.description: Users can view the game lobby, create a new room, or join an available room.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View available rooms -> Create a room -> See the new room appear in the lobby
Navigate to /dashboard -> View available rooms -> Join an existing room -> Enter the game room

features.name: Multiplayer Game Board
features.description: Users can play the active multiplayer match by selecting cards, choosing targets, and confirming their turn actions while following the live game log.
user_flows: Navigate to /game/:roomId -> View the active game board -> Select a card from hand -> Select a target opponent -> Confirm choice -> See the card action resolve
Navigate to /game/:roomId -> View the active game board -> Select a card from hand -> Confirm choice -> See the selected card play on the board
Navigate to /game/:roomId -> View the active game board -> Observe real-time game logs -> Watch turn progress and wealth updates

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Users can log in or sign up using Supabase Auth
user_interactions: Click Login or Sign Up button

features.name: Dashboard and Matchmaking
features.description: Users view available rooms and can join or create them

features.name: Multiplayer Game Board
features.description: The main game UI where players take turns, draw cards, and play them
user_interactions: Click on a card in hand to select it
Click "Confirm Choice" to play a card
